testCases.name: happy path - creating listener assigns task, user task completed, process ends
testCases.description: The user task has a 'creating' task listener that fires before the task is visible. In CPT, this creates a listener job that must be completed first (COMPLETE_JOB_USER_TASK_LISTENER). The corrections.assignee field simulates the listener assigning the task to a user. Once the listener job completes, the user task is active and can be completed with COMPLETE_USER_TASK.

_integrationTestNotes: Integration tests should verify: (1) the 'creating' task listener worker (job type: assign_new_task) is registered and fires when the user task is created; (2) the worker sets the task assignee via the corrections/assignee mechanism on the real Zeebe user task; (3) the assigned user can claim and complete the task via Tasklist or the API; (4) confirm the task is visible in Tasklist only after the listener job completes.
